headline: ONEOK Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: TULSA, Okla., April 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The board of directors of ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE: OKE) today declared a quarterly dividend of $1.07 per share, unchanged from the previous quarter, resulting in an annualized dividend of $4.28 per share. The dividend is payable May 15, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business May 4, 2026. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
